description: Evidence statements supporting each learning track recommendation, split from learning_tracks for cleaner normalization.

fields.name: learning_track_id
fields.description: Learning track this evidence belongs to

fields.name: learner_id
fields.description: Denormalized learner id for direct filtering

fields.name: assessment_id
fields.description: Assessment identifier that generated this evidence

fields.name: evidence_aptitude
fields.example: Analytical mindset supports debugging and troubleshooting

fields.name: evidence_interest
fields.example: Growing interest in observability and system monitoring

fields.name: evidence_personality
fields.example: Conscientiousness and attention to detail fit production-grade systems

fields.name: evidence_employability
fields.example: Strong communication skills aid in incident response and team collaboration

fields.name: evidence_adaptive_aptitude
fields.description: Adaptive aptitude growth insight behind recommendation
fields.example: Ready to advance from fundamentals to production engineering practices

indexes.name: idx_lte_learning_track_id
indexes.description: One evidence row per learning track

indexes.name: idx_lte_learner_assessment
indexes.description: Get learner evidence set for a given assessment

relationships.description: Each evidence record belongs to one learning track
